title: julbernardia paniculata
intro: Julbernardia paniculata, also known as the African redwood or iroko, is a tropical tree species native to West and Central Africa. Its medicinal properties include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Julbernardia paniculata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used to make ointments and salves for topical application.
